title: genista desoleana subsp. desoleana
intro: Genista desoleana subsp. desoleana, also known as Italian Spiny Broom or Genista desoleana, is a plant species in the pea family (Fabaceae). It is a spiny shrub that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is rich in flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other bioactive compounds that contribute to its health benefits, which may include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and immune-modulating effects. Genista desoleana subsp. desoleana can be prepared as an infusion or tea, and in some cases, it is used in herbal preparations, such as tinctures and capsules, although its use should be guided by a healthcare professional.
